scripts.test: find src/__tests__ -name '*.test.ts' -not -name '*.integration.test.ts' -print0 | xargs -0 env WIKIDATA_ENRICHMENT_DISABLED=1 node --import tsx --test --experimental-test-module-mocks
scripts.test:coverage: mkdir -p coverage && find src/__tests__ -name '*.test.ts' -not -name '*.integration.test.ts' -print0 | xargs -0 env WIKIDATA_ENRICHMENT_DISABLED=1 node --import tsx --test --experimental-test-module-mocks --experimental-test-coverage --test-reporter=lcov --test-reporter-destination=coverage/unit.info --test-reporter=spec --test-reporter-destination=stdout
